title: CommitSummary
description: Phase 4 artifact: Summary of code changes made by the agent for a single task commit. Emitted after each task commit during the Code phase. Gap 3 enforces this via ajv.

files_changed.description: Files created or modified in this commit (from git diff --name-only)

summary.description: One-sentence summary of what changed and why

test_coverage_note.description: Optional note about what tests cover the change
